title: synaedrys glabra
side_effects: Synaedrys glabra can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive consumption leading to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or high doses may also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals. Furthermore, improper preparation or handling of the plant can cause allergic reactions, resulting in skin irritation, itching, or respiratory problems. In severe cases, misusing Synaedrys glabra can lead to interactions with other medications or exacerbate underlying health conditions.
